team_name: Pramaan — AI-Assisted, Audit-Ready Tender Eligibility Evaluation for CRPF
summary: Design a platform that automates the evaluation and eligibility analysis of tender documents and bidder submissions for government procurement, producing explainable evaluation reports for human officers.
key_steps: Producing verdicts: Eligible, Not Eligible, or Needs Review
Recording every verdict, override, and re-run in an append-only audit log
optimization_claims: Reducing officer-hours spent on evaluation by automating the boring, repeatable parts of the work
Providing a machine-readable audit trail for transparency and accountability
